reviews.comment:
Siempre bien atendido aunque a veces la demora en cargar combustible, por la fila que se forma, haga aparecer la impaciencia. Pero calidad del combustible, la  atención del playero y su precio amerita un poco de espera

(Translated by Google)
The service is always excellent, although the long lines at the pump can sometimes cause impatience. But the fuel quality, the attendant's attentiveness, and the price make it worth the wait.

reviews.comment:
Amo este lugar. En mecanica t atienden excelente... los chicos q cargan nafta siempre mega dispuestos y todos los chicos q forman part d la full tienen re buena onda. Tienen las mesitas d afuera. Ahora pusieron mas. Usualmente hay 2 sobre cabildo pero hay horarios en q las encontras libres. Es lindo volver dond t dan buena atencion y calidad.

(Translated by Google)
I love this place. The mechanics are excellent... the guys who pump gas are always super helpful, and everyone at the Full service station is really friendly. They have tables outside. They've added more recently. There are usually two on Cabildo Avenue, but sometimes you can find them free. It's great to come back to a place that offers good service and quality.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpck9tYlZ3EAE
